sect1.title: Heal Thyself
sect1.para: Nurses are professional healers. Nurses learn to heal through the recognition of symptomatology associated with different disease processes. However, for nurses when scars turn inward, the nurse as healer experiences emotional wounds that unattended to, manifest as physical and mental illness. To heal thyself is often not possible. Therefore, nurses will require someone to listen, maintaining confidentiality, to their story and situation related to bullying and help them to identify, processes, develop, and plan approaches to heal their pain so that they can move toward action and, ultimately, forgiveness. Because in absence of forgiveness, nurses affected by The Hollow give power to those who bully.
